title: Quiz App
description: A quiz application with 10 multiple choice questions. Users receive immediate feedback upon selecting an answer, and the quiz resets after submission.

title: Tic Tac Toe Game
description: A classic Tic Tac Toe game. When a player wins, a congratulations message is shown and the game resets automatically.

title: Parking System
description: A parking management system with fixed pricing for motorcycles, cars, and trucks. Parking spots become available again automatically when a vehicle leaves.
